failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Dashboard can crash during initial metric render.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Metric cards depend on async data and require guarded render paths.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Dashboard queries can return incomplete payloads.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Aggregated dashboard state depends on multiple entity reads with differing completeness.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Case metrics can misalign with entity defaults.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Missing status defaults can cause incorrect KPI grouping and totals.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Role scope can hide data unexpectedly.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Admin and non-admin flows use different entity query strategies and must stay aligned.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Stage summaries can diverge from actual lifecycle rules.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Dashboard cards summarize stages that depend on cross-page workflow consistency.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Runtime dependency failures can block page hydration.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Router, query provider, and auth wrapper must all initialize before dashboard content renders.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Broken drill-down links can route users incorrectly.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Dashboard action surfaces depend on exact route contracts for downstream pages.

failure_point_inventory.failure_point: Task and case summaries can drift from persisted activity state.
failure_point_inventory.evidence: Dashboard relies on last-activity and task state being updated consistently across pages.

issues.title: Initial dashboard metric render instability
issues.symptom: Dashboard can fail before fully rendering cards when dependent values are missing during first paint.
issues.root_cause: Dashboard metric components relied on asynchronous entity-derived values without complete defensive fallbacks for early render and partial dataset states.
issues.failure_mechanism: The render path attempted to derive display values before all query-backed aggregates were normalized into safe defaults.
issues.impact: Users can experience a blank or unstable dashboard route instead of a resilient loading-to-data transition.
issues.fix_implemented: Normalized dashboard render dependencies so card sections receive guarded values and remain stable across loading, empty, and partial data states.
issues.why_fix_is_correct: It removes unsafe render assumptions and enforces a deterministic contract between async query state and card presentation.
validation_evidence: Verified dashboard route remains renderable with async loading and incomplete metric inputs.

issues.title: Dashboard drill-down dependency mismatch
issues.symptom: Dashboard links and summary cards can direct users into mismatched filtered views.
issues.root_cause: The dashboard depended on downstream route context assumptions that were not consistently aligned with the cases page filter contract.
issues.failure_mechanism: Summary cards emitted drill-down intents that could diverge from the filters actually consumed by the destination page model.
issues.impact: Users can land on downstream pages that appear inconsistent with the dashboard metric they selected.
issues.fix_implemented: Aligned dashboard drill-down logic with the route resolver and downstream page filter contract so summary navigation reflects real filtered state.
issues.why_fix_is_correct: It ensures the source metric definition and destination page interpretation use the same contract and no longer drift.
validation_evidence: Verified dashboard metric navigation resolves into matching downstream filtered page states.

issues.title: Dashboard activity totals can go stale after case updates
issues.symptom: Dashboard cards may display outdated counts after case-detail edits or workflow actions.
issues.root_cause: Upstream pages did not consistently refresh or stamp last-activity and related query keys after persisted case mutations.
issues.failure_mechanism: Dashboard aggregate queries depend on current persisted case activity fields, but upstream mutation paths were not fully audit-refresh safe.
issues.impact: Users can see stale dashboard numbers that do not match the latest case state.
issues.fix_implemented: Hardened case update and close flows to refresh activity-linked queries and persist current activity timestamps needed by dashboard summaries.
issues.why_fix_is_correct: It brings upstream persistence and downstream aggregation into a single consistent data freshness model.
validation_evidence: Verified dashboard-dependent activity fields are refreshed after case mutations that affect summary state.

checks: Dashboard route renders without blank-screen failure during loading state transitions.
Dashboard cards remain visible and stable with empty and populated data scenarios.
Dashboard summary interactions route users into downstream views consistently.
Dashboard card state remains aligned after upstream case updates.
Dashboard entity-backed reads remain aligned with the data consumed by card aggregations.
No active request contract mismatch remains in the reviewed dashboard data paths.
Dashboard summaries tolerate empty datasets without invalid totals or null crashes.
Case activity-dependent counts now refresh after reviewed upstream mutations.
Role-scoped dashboard reads remain consistent with app auth wrappers.
Reviewed dashboard paths do not expose unauthorized data outside expected role scope.
Reviewed dashboard render paths handle incomplete data without fatal exceptions.
Dashboard fallback behavior remains present when source data is missing or empty.

console_and_server_cleanliness.details: No active errors remain; reviewed dashboard and linked case-detail mutation paths are currently clean.

regression_checks: Confirmed dashboard-related drill-down changes remain aligned with Cases page route interpretation.
Confirmed reviewed case-detail persistence changes continue to support dashboard summary freshness.

enterprise_standard_confirmation.notes: The reviewed dashboard and supporting case mutation paths now follow guarded, contract-aligned, and refresh-safe patterns.

final_status.summary: The dashboard stability and its reviewed upstream dependencies were hardened, but a full application-wide page-by-page remediation is still outstanding.
remaining_issues: Only the dashboard-first slice and reviewed case-detail dependencies have been fully remediated so far.
